title: PGIMER Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Various Senior Medical Officer Posts
description: The Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for Senior Medical Officer Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in Post Graduation, MBBA, MD/ MS can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Go...
